name: state-machine-handler-dict
description: State machine pattern: dict[RunState, handler] with while loop driving until terminal state. Handlers accept Run and return updated Run with new state.

name: async-polling-loop
description: Async polling loop: dispatch ready subtasks, sleep, collect results. Completion signal is collect_result().diff (new commits), secondary is check_status() for dead agents. Test by patching asyncio.sleep to return immediately.

name: dag-dependency-checking
description: DAG dependency checking: deps met when all dep descriptions appear in done_descriptions set (subtask.description for state==done). Subtask description is the dependency identifier.

name: deadlock-detection
description: Deadlock detection: when no subtasks running AND no pending subtasks have deps_met, transition to failed state. Prevents infinite loop when DAG has unsatisfiable dependencies.

name: agent-tracking-map
description: Agent tracking: maintain agent_map dict[subtask_id -> agent_id] to collect results after polling. Required because Subtask only stores agent id string, not AgentSlot object.

name: state-handler-dict-dispatch
description: Orchestrator state machine with dict-based handler dispatch from RunState to async methods

name: execute-poll-dispatch
description: Orchestrator._execute polls for subtask completion, dispatches ready subtasks respecting DAG deps, detects deadlock when no subtasks can dispatch
